metodos.codigoOriginal:
Lparameters pNop, pProduto

ThisForm.poDataMgr.CursorQuery('SigCdPro', 'LocalPro', 'CPros', pProduto, 'MoeCusfs, CustoFs, pVens, Moevs ')
ThisForm.poDataMgr.CursorQuery('SigCdMoe', 'crMoe', 'CMoes', LocalPro.MoeCusFs)
Go Top In crMoe
If Not Empty(crMoe.Moeqs)
	m.Moedas = crMoe.Moeqs
	_Qtdeqs = Iif(crMoe.Qtdeqs = 0, 1, crMoe.Qtdeqs)
Else
	m.Moedas = LocalPro.MoeCusFs
	_Qtdeqs = 1
EndIf
Moev = fBuscarCotacao(m.Moedas, TmpNens.Datas, ThisForm.poDataMgr)  * _Qtdeqs
lnCp = 0

Select CrSigCdNei
Scan f... [TRUNCADO]

Private pDat, pQtd, pQt2
Local _Recno1, _Pesagem, _Nop, _TotalAnterior, _Diferenca, _RecnoRateio

Select crSigCdOpd
Set Order to Dopps
Seek TmpNens.Dopps

Select CrSigCdNei
Zap

Select xNensiE
Zap

Select xNensI
Set Order To

Select xNensiE
Append From Dbf('xNensI')
Sum Pesos To _TotPeso For Visivel And Not Servicos
Set Order to Rateio
Delete All For Empty(Nops) And Empty(CMats) And Empty(Cats) And (Rateio <> 1)
Go Top

_Tpop = TpOps

If InList(crSigCdOpd.Etiqs, 1, 3)
	_Amarra = Recno('xPesa')

... [TRUNCADO]

Lparameters _ParentForm

ThisForm.cntSombra.lblSombra.Caption = ThisForm.Caption
ThisForm.cntSombra.lblTitulo.Caption = ThisForm.Caption

ThisForm.ParentForm    = _ParentForm
ThisForm.DataSessionId = _ParentForm.DataSessionId

ThisForm.poDataMgr  = CreateObject('fSqlConector', ThisForm.Name)
Thisform.poDataMgr.AddCursor('SigPrCpo', 'cIdChaves', 'CsSigPrCpo', '','')

_Prog = 'P' + Padl( crSigCdOpd.Ndopps, 8, '0' )

With ThisForm.GradeItens
	.RecordSource = 'xPesa'
	.Column1.ControlSource = 'xPesa... [TRUNCADO]
Return .f.
Return (crSigCdPam.LibObss <> 1)

If (This.Value <> 0)
	If ThisForm.Alterou
		lcSql = [Select b.mtprimas From SigCdPro a, SigCdGrp b Where a.Cpros = ']+xPesa.Cpros+[' And a.Cgrus = b.Cgrus ]
		ThisForm.ParentForm.PodataMgr.Sqlexecute(lcSql,'TmpGru')
		Select xPesa
		Skip
		Skip -1
		_Nenve = xPesa.Nenvs
		_recno = Recno()
		ThisForm.RatPeso()
		ThisForm.CustoProducao(xPesa.Nops,xPesa.Cpros)

		If xpesa.Especial

			lcSql = [Select * from SigPrCpo Where Cpros = ']+xpesa.Cpros+[']
			ThisForm.parentform.Podatamgr.Sqlexecute(lcsql,... [TRUNCADO]

If This.Value = 0 Or This.Value = ThisForm.OldValue 
	Return .t.
EndIf
If (This.Value < 0)
	=Messagebox('O Peso Năo Pode Ser Um Valor Negativo!!!', 32, '')
	This.Value = ThisForm.OldValue
	Return 0
EndIf
ThisForm.Alterou = .t.
lcSql = [Select DifPes From SigCdEmp Where Cemps = ']+_Empr+[']
ThisForm.Podatamgr.Sqlexecute(lcsql,'CrSigCdEmp')

If (crSigCdPam.DifPesags <> 0 And CrSigCdEmp.DifPes = [S] )
	ThisForm.parentform.poDataMgr.CursorQuery('SigCdPro', 'LocalPro', 'CPros', xPesa.Cpros, 'PesoMs, ... [TRUNCADO]

ThisForm.Alterou = .f.
ThisForm.OldValue = This.Value
If (ThisForm.ParentForm.pcEscolha = 'INSERIR') And CrSigCdOpd.TrfPesas <> 1
	ThisForm.Balança.Ativa(This)
	If (This.Value <> 0) And (Lastkey() <> 27) And Not ThisForm.Balança.TempoEsgotado
		Select xPesa
		Skip
		If Eof()
*			ThisForm.Resumo.SetFocus
		Else
			If (crSigCdPam.LibObss = 1)
				ThisForm.GradeItens.Column2.SetFocus
			Else
				ThisForm.GradeItens.Column5.SetFocus
			EndIf
		EndIf
	EndIf
EndIf
Return (ThisForm.ParentForm.pcEscolha... [TRUNCADO]
Return .f.
Return (crSigCdPam.LibObss = 1)

Local loLista

If Not Empty(This.Value)
	loLista = CreateObject('fwBuscaExt', ThisForm.parentform.poDataMgr.pnIdConn, 'SigCdTam', ;
						   'crListaRemota', 'Cods', This.Value, 'Seleçăo', .t.)

	If Not loLista.plAchouRegistro
		loLista.mAddColuna('Cods',  '', 'Código')
		loLista.mAddColuna('Descs', '', 'Descriçăo')
		loLista.Show()
	EndIf
	
	This.Value = crListaRemota.Cods
	Use In crListaRemota
Else
	This.Value = ''
EndIf
This.Refresh
* Fim ******************************************************... [TRUNCADO]
Return (crSigCdPam.LibObss = 1)

Local loLista

If Not Empty(This.Value)
	loLista = CreateObject('fwBuscaExt', ThisForm.parentform.poDataMgr.pnIdConn, 'SigCdCor', ;
						   'crListaRemota', 'Cods', This.Value, 'Seleçăo', .t.)

	If Not loLista.plAchouRegistro
		loLista.mAddColuna('Cods',  '', 'Código')
		loLista.mAddColuna('Descs', '', 'Descriçăo')
		loLista.Show()
	EndIf
	
	This.Value = crListaRemota.Cods
	Use In crListaRemota
Else
	This.Value = ''
EndIf
This.Refresh
* Fim ******************************************************... [TRUNCADO]
Return (crSigCdPam.LibObss = 1)
Return .f.

_Prog = 'P' + Padl( crSigCdOpd.Ndopps, 8, '0' )
If fChecaAcesso( _Prog, "CUSTOP" )
	Select xPesa
	_Recno = Recno('xPesa')
	Do Form SigCdPro With 'PESAGEM', xPesa.Cpros
	Select xPesa
	If _recno > 0
		Go _Recno
	Endif
EndIf
Return .f.
Do Form SigPdM10 With ThisForm.ParentForm

_Prog = 'P' + Padl( crSigCdOpd.Ndopps, 8, '0' )
If fChecaAcesso( _Prog, "CUSTOP" ) And InList(ThisForm.ParentForm.pcEscolha,'INSERIR','ALTERAR')
	Select xPesa
	_Recno = Recno('xPesa')
	Do Form SigCdPro With 'PESAGEM', xPesa.Cpros
	Select xPesa
	If _recno > 0
		Locate For Recno() = _Recno
	Endif
EndIf
ThisForm.GradeItens.SetFocus

Select xPesa
Scan
	If (Peso = 0) And (ThisForm.ParentForm.pcEscolha = 'INSERIR')
		=Messagebox('Existe Uma Peça Que Năo Foi Pesada!!!', 32, '')
		ThisForm.GradeItens.Refresh
		Return
	EndIf
EndScan

Select xNensiS
If Reccount() > 0
	DO Form SigPdM11 With ThisForm.Parentform, ThisForm.DataSessionId
Endif

ThisForm.ParentForm.Enabled = .t.
ThisForm.Release
* Fim **************************************************************************************

If !Empty(this.Value)
	Select xPesa
	Sum qtds to ntotal
	npeso = this.Value / ntotal

	Scan
		replace peso with qtds * npeso
	EndScan
	Go top
EndIf
Return .f.

sqlQueries.queryOriginal: lcSql = [Select b.mtprimas From SigCdPro a, SigCdGrp b Where a.Cpros = ']+xPesa.Cpros+[' And a.Cgrus = b.Cgrus ] 		ThisForm.ParentForm.PodataMgr.Sqlexecute(lcSql,'TmpGru')
lcSql = [Select DifPes From SigCdEmp Where Cemps = ']+_Empr+['] ThisForm.Podatamgr.Sqlexecute(lcsql,'CrSigCdEmp')
